Utility)
testbasec
TestCombinationc
superr
myinitZ
_start_ovsZ
_start_netagent)
self
	__class__
@/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/na_tests/ft/test_combination.pyr
TestCombination.myinitc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip=1.2.3.5"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip=1.2.3.5
na-ctl wait --id=1
acl_by_add_acl_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='conbination_acl_icmp' chain='root'>
  <uuid>5b5b5872-1234-4544-a542-66ecd2d2343e</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='10' statematch='false'>
    <icmp dstipaddr='1.2.3.5' dstipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
acl_by_add_acl_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{conbination_acl_icmp}.xml
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl add-listen --id=2 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={conbination_acl_icmp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={conbination_acl_icmp}
na-ctl wait --id=2
na-ctl nwfilter update {conbination_acl_icmp}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
na-ctl add-listen --id=3 --event="remove Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 other_config bind-ip
na-ctl wait --id=3
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows2.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows2.txt
if test  $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
conbination_acl_icmp)
nwfilterdir
test_dirTr
z@test combine config bind ip and acl failed: shell return code:%d
cmd_execute
format
nwfilter_dir
	_test_dir
assertEqual
retr
test_bindip_acl
TestCombination.test_bindip_aclc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip=1.2.3.6"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip=1.2.3.6
na-ctl wait --id=1
fw_by_add_white_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='combination_white_icmp' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>15f34567-1234-4402-9927-3f6f74524691</uuid>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <icmp dstipaddr='1.2.3.6' dstipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_white_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{conbinationwhiteicmp}.xml
na-ctl add-listen --id=2 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={conbinationwhiteicmp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={conbinationwhiteicmp}
na-ctl wait --id=2
na-ctl nwfilter update {conbinationwhiteicmp}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
na-ctl add-listen --id=3 --event="remove Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 other_config bind-ip
na-ctl wait --id=3
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows2.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows2.txt
if test  $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
combination_white_icmp)
conbinationwhiteicmpr
z?test combine config bind ip and fw failed: shell return code:%dr
test_bindip_fwP
TestCombination.test_bindip_fwc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
acl_by_add_acl_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='conbine_acl_icmp' chain='root'>
  <uuid>5b5b5872-1234-4544-a542-66ecd2d2343e</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='false'>
    <icmp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' dstipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
acl_by_add_acl_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{conbine_acl_icmp}.xml
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={conbine_acl_icmp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={conbine_acl_icmp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {conbine_acl_icmp}
fw_by_add_fw_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='conbine_fw_icmp' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>15fdfa87-ce43-4402-9927-3f6f74524691</uuid>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <icmp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_fw_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{conbine_fw_icmp}.xml
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl add-listen --id=2 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={conbine_fw_icmp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={conbine_fw_icmp}
na-ctl wait --id=2
na-ctl nwfilter update {conbine_fw_icmp}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p2 'in_port(2),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows2.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows2.txt
if test  $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
conbine_acl_icmp
conbine_fw_icmp)
z;test combine config acl and fw failed: shell return code:%dr
test_acl_fw
TestCombination.test_acl_fwc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=secure --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip=1.1.0.3"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip=1.1.0.3
na-ctl wait --id=1
ADDR1=1.1.0.1
ADDRD=1.1.0.2
NETFILENAME="qos_test"
get_netfile() {{
    cat <<EOF
<netprofile name="$NETFILENAME" type="qos" uuid="245324" version="1">
  <flow direction="in" dl_type="ip" nw_dst="$ADDR1/24" nw_proto="icmp" priority="15">
    <action burst="2" domain="interface" id="5" rate="1" unit="kbps" />
  </flow>
</netprofile>
na-ctl netprofile define --content "$(get_netfile)"
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 1
PRTNAME="6cecd756-a718-4ed6-9679-a19c38461d42_1"
get_portprofile() {{
    cat <<EOF
<portprofile name="$PRTNAME" type="compose">
  <netprofile name="$NETFILENAME" type="qos" />
</portprofile>
na-ctl portprofile define --content "$(get_portprofile)"
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=2 --event="set Interface p1 external_ids:port-profile=$PRTNAME"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 external_ids:port-profile=$PRTNAME
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
na-ctl wait --id=2  # so net-agentd knows the configuration
# Strips out uninteresting parts of flow output, as well as parts
# that vary from one run to another (e.g., timing and bond actions).
strip_timers () {{
    sed '
    s/duration:[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/duration:0.0/
    s/used:[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/used:0.0/
ovs-appctl time/warp 5000
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep "actions:drop$" br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 4
# with burst size 2 (== 2000 bits). 4 packets, (240 bytes == 1920 bits) pass, but the last packet should hit the drop band.
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats.txt
cat <<EOF > meterstats_expected.txt
OFPST_METER reply (OF1.3) (xid=0x2):
meter:2 flow_count:1 packet_in_count:0 byte_in_count:0 duration:0.0s bands:
0: packet_count:0 byte_count:0
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected.txt meterstats.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 5
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=2 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip=1.1.0.1"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip=1.1.0.1
na-ctl wait --id=2  # sleep 0.5
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep "actions:meter(0),2$" br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 6
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats1.txt
cat <<EOF > meterstats_expected.txt
OFPST_METER reply (OF1.3) (xid=0x2):
meter:2 flow_count:1 packet_in_count:5 byte_in_count:300 duration:0.0s bands:
0: packet_count:1 byte_count:60
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected.txt meterstats1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 7
z1test bindip qos combination: shell return code:%d)
check_meter_testr
test_bindip_qos
TestCombination.test_bindip_qosc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
ADDR1=1.1.0.1
ADDRD=1.1.0.2
acl_by_add_acl_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='acl_icmp' chain='root'>
  <uuid>5b5b5872-1234-4544-a542-66ecd2d2343e</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='10' statematch='false'>
    <icmp dstipaddr='$ADDRD' dstipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
acl_by_add_acl_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{aclicmp}.xml
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={aclicmp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={aclicmp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {aclicmp}
NETFILENAME="qos_test"
get_netfile() {{
    cat <<EOF
<netprofile name="$NETFILENAME" type="qos" uuid="245324" version="1">
  <flow direction="in" dl_type="ip" nw_dst="$ADDR1/24" nw_proto="icmp" priority="15">
    <action burst="2" domain="interface" id="5" rate="1" unit="kbps" />
  </flow>
</netprofile>
na-ctl netprofile define --content "$(get_netfile)"
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 1
PRTNAME="6cecd756-a718-4ed6-9679-a19c38461d42_1"
get_portprofile() {{
    cat <<EOF
<portprofile name="$PRTNAME" type="compose">
  <netprofile name="$NETFILENAME" type="qos" />
</portprofile>
na-ctl portprofile define --content "$(get_portprofile)"
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=2 --event="set Interface p1 external_ids:port-profile=$PRTNAME"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 external_ids:port-profile=$PRTNAME
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
na-ctl wait --id=2  # sleep 0.5  # so net-agentd knows the configuration
# Strips out uninteresting parts of flow output, as well as parts
# that vary from one run to another (e.g., timing and bond actions).
strip_timers () {{
    sed '
    s/duration:[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/duration:0.0/
    s/used:[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/used:0.0/
ovs-appctl time/warp 5000
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep "actions:meter(0)$" br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 4
# with burst size 2 (== 2000 bits). 4 packets, (240 bytes == 1920 bits) pass, but the last packet should hit the drop band.
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats.txt
cat <<EOF > meterstats_expected.txt
OFPST_METER reply (OF1.3) (xid=0x2):
meter:2 flow_count:1 packet_in_count:5 byte_in_count:300 duration:0.0s bands:
0: packet_count:1 byte_count:60
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected.txt meterstats.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 5
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=3 --event="remove Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 other_config nwfilter
na-ctl wait --id=3  # sleep 2
ovs-appctl time/warp 5000
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep "actions:meter(0),2$" br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 6
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats1.txt
cat <<EOF > meterstats_expected.txt
OFPST_METER reply (OF1.3) (xid=0x2):
meter:2 flow_count:1 packet_in_count:10 byte_in_count:600 duration:0.0s bands:
0: packet_count:2 byte_count:120
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected.txt meterstats1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 7
acl_icmp
aclicmpr
z7test inacl qos combination failed: shell return code:%d
test_inacl_qos_
TestCombination.test_inacl_qosc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
ADDR1=1.1.0.1
ADDRD=1.1.0.2
acl_by_add_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='acl_icmp' chain='root'>
  <uuid>54ba2e43-a4c2-44e1-be3c-134034983232</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='false'>
    <icmp dstipaddr='1.1.0.2' dstipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
acl_by_add_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{aclicmp}.xml
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={aclicmp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={aclicmp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {aclicmp}
NETFILENAME="qos_test"
# main difference with test_icmp_in_direction_qos is: direction => out 
get_netfile() {{
    cat <<EOF
<netprofile name="$NETFILENAME" type="qos" uuid="245324" version="1">
  <flow direction="out" dl_type="ip" nw_dst="$ADDRD/24" nw_proto="icmp" priority="15">
    <action burst="2" domain="interface" id="5" rate="1" unit="kbps" />
  </flow>
</netprofile>
na-ctl netprofile define --content "$(get_netfile)"
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 1
PRTNAME="6cecd756-a718-4ed6-9679-a19c38461d42_1"
get_portprofile() {{
    cat <<EOF
<portprofile name="$PRTNAME" type="compose">
  <netprofile name="$NETFILENAME" type="qos" />
</portprofile>
na-ctl portprofile define --content "$(get_portprofile)"
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=2 --event="set Interface p2 external_ids:port-profile=$PRTNAME"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 external_ids:port-profile=$PRTNAME
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
na-ctl wait --id=2  # so net-agentd knows the configuration
# Strips out uninteresting parts of flow output, as well as parts
# that vary from one run to another (e.g., timing and bond actions).
strip_timers () {{
    sed '
    s/duration:[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/duration:0.0/
    s/used:[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/used:0.0/
ovs-appctl time/warp 5000
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
# with burst size 2 (== 2000 bits). 4 packets, (240 bytes == 1920 bits) pass, but the last packet should hit the drop band.
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats.txt
cat <<EOF > meterstats_expected.txt
OFPST_METER reply (OF1.3) (xid=0x2):
meter:2 flow_count:1 packet_in_count:5 byte_in_count:300 duration:0.0s bands:
0: packet_count:1 byte_count:60
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected.txt meterstats.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 4
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep "actions:meter(0)$" br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 5
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=3 --event="remove Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p2 other_config nwfilter
na-ctl wait --id=3
ovs-appctl time/warp 5000
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep "actions:meter(0),2$" br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 6
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats1.txt
cat <<EOF > meterstats_expected.txt
OFPST_METER reply (OF1.3) (xid=0x2):
meter:2 flow_count:1 packet_in_count:10 byte_in_count:600 duration:0.0s bands:
0: packet_count:2 byte_count:120
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected.txt meterstats1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 7
z8test outacl qos combination failed: shell return code:%dr 
test_outacl_qos
TestCombination.test_outacl_qosc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
ADDR1=1.1.0.1
ADDRD=1.1.0.2
fw_by_add_black_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='black_icmp' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>4ef74acc-8778-4219-87e7-10d4e3e5874a</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <icmp dstipaddr='$ADDRD' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_black_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{blackicmp}.xml
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={blackicmp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={blackicmp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {blackicmp}
NETFILENAME="qos_test"
# main difference with test_icmp_in_direction_qos is: direction => out 
get_netfile() {{
    cat <<EOF
<netprofile name="$NETFILENAME" type="qos" uuid="245324" version="1">
  <flow direction="in" dl_type="ip" nw_dst="$ADDRD/24" nw_proto="icmp" priority="15">
    <action burst="2" domain="interface" id="5" rate="1" unit="kbps" />
  </flow>
</netprofile>
na-ctl netprofile define --content "$(get_netfile)"
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 1
PRTNAME="6cecd756-a718-4ed6-9679-a19c38461d42_1"
get_portprofile() {{
    cat <<EOF
<portprofile name="$PRTNAME" type="compose">
  <netprofile name="$NETFILENAME" type="qos" />
</portprofile>
na-ctl portprofile define --content "$(get_portprofile)"
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
na-ctl add-listen --id=2 --event="set Interface p1 external_ids:port-profile=$PRTNAME"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 external_ids:port-profile=$PRTNAME
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
na-ctl wait --id=2  # so net-agentd knows the configuration
# Strips out uninteresting parts of flow output, as well as parts
# that vary from one run to another (e.g., timing and bond actions).
strip_timers () {{
    sed '
    s/duration:[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/duration:0.0/
    s/used:[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/used:0.0/
ovs-appctl time/warp 5000
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep "actions:meter(0)" br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 4
# with burst size 2 (== 2000 bits). 4 packets, (240 bytes == 1920 bits) pass, but the last packet should hit the drop band.
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats.txt
cat <<EOF > meterstats_expected.txt
OFPST_METER reply (OF1.3) (xid=0x2):
meter:2 flow_count:1 packet_in_count:5 byte_in_count:300 duration:0.0s bands:
0: packet_count:1 byte_count:60
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected.txt meterstats.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 5
na-ctl add-listen --id=3 --event="remove Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 other_config nwfilter
na-ctl wait --id=3
ovs-appctl time/warp 5000
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep "actions:meter(0),2$" br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 6
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats1.txt

OFPST_METER reply (OF1.3) (xid=0x2):
meter:2 flow_count:1 packet_in_count:10 byte_in_count:600 duration:0.0s bands:
0: packet_count:2 byte_count:120
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected.txt meterstats1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 7
black_icmp)

z4test fw qos combination failed: shell return code:%dr 
test_fw_qos_combination{
z'TestCombination.test_fw_qos_combination)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__r
__classcell__r
na_tests.common.utilityr
na_tests.commonr
TestCaseBaser
<module>
